title: what's the possible reason for the hang at time 0 in cosim mode?

features.name: recursive evaluation cycle at time 0 between initial and combinational logic
features.description: Code should include an initial block that triggers a combinational logic evaluation which recursively re-enters initial evaluation, creating an infinite loop at time 0 without reporting DIDNOTCONVERGE error

features.name: eval_settle called from within initial evaluation loop
features.description: Code should include an evaluation sequence where _eval_settle is invoked from within _eval_initial_loop, causing recursive combinational logic evaluation at time 0
